expectations.text: Exactly one new commit was created
expectations.evidence: git-log-oneline.txt shows d6caca2 as new commit on top of the 3 prior commits (Add request logging, Wire health endpoint, Add OpenAPI client scaffolding).

expectations.text: The new commit is NOT empty — src/api/client.ts is in the diff
expectations.evidence: Transcript STEP 5 shows git output: '1 file changed, 31 insertions(+) / create mode 100644 src/api/client.ts'.

expectations.text: Commit subject is 72 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: Subject 'Add retryWithBackoff helper in src/api/client.ts' is 48 characters.

expectations.text: Commit subject has no trailing period
expectations.evidence: Subject ends with 'client.ts' — no trailing period.

expectations.text: Commit subject mentions retry, backoff, OR jitter (specific to the work)
expectations.evidence: Subject contains 'retryWithBackoff' — covers retry and backoff.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Summary' section
expectations.evidence: Body uses plain text headings like 'Why this shape:' and 'Alternatives considered and rejected'. No markdown '## Summary' heading present.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## What happened' section
expectations.evidence: No '## What happened' markdown heading in commit-full.txt body.

expectations.text: Commit body has a '## Files touched' section
expectations.evidence: No '## Files touched' markdown heading in commit-full.txt body.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions src/api/client.ts
expectations.evidence: 'src/api/client.ts' appears only in the subject line; the commit body (lines 4+) does not reference the file path explicitly. It only refers to 'the OpenAI, Anthropic, and Stripe SDKs' and the helper function name without restating the path.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the function name retryWithBackoff
expectations.evidence: The function name 'retryWithBackoff' appears in the subject only; the body refers to it as 'this' / the helper without naming it. Search of body lines 4-23 finds no occurrence of retryWithBackoff.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions all three SDKs that were researched: OpenAI, Anthropic, AND Stripe
expectations.evidence: Body line 7: 'Surveyed retry implementations in the OpenAI, Anthropic, and Stripe SDKs.'

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the chosen parameters (base 500ms, cap 8s, OR full jitter)
expectations.evidence: Body line 4: 'Exponential backoff with full jitter: base 500ms, cap 8s, max 5 attempts.' Also line 9: '(500ms / 8s / full jitter)'.

expectations.text: Commit body mentions WHY Anthropic's pattern was chosen (rate-limit similarity)
expectations.evidence: Body lines 9-12: 'Picked Anthropic's pattern (...) because our upstream rate limits are shaped most like theirs — per-minute token buckets rather than strict RPS — so the same backoff envelope should behave similarly under throttling.'

expectations.text: Commit body mentions the REJECTED options (linear, fixed delay, exponential without jitter) so the next session knows what was already considered
expectations.evidence: Body lines 14-19 list all three: 'Linear backoff: too slow...', 'Fixed delay: causes thundering-herd...', 'Exponential without jitter: same thundering-herd problem...'.

expectations.text: Commit body total length is at least 600 characters (research-heavy session)
expectations.evidence: Body (from line 4 to end of commit-full.txt) measures 966 characters.

expectations.text: Commit has co-author trailer
expectations.evidence: No 'Co-Authored-By:' trailer in commit-full.txt. Transcript STEP 4 reasoning #5 explicitly says 'No Co-Authored-By trailer: ... the user did not ask for attribution.'

expectations.text: Working tree is clean after the commit
expectations.evidence: git-status.txt: 'On branch main / nothing to commit, working tree clean'.

expectations.text: No push occurred
expectations.evidence: Transcript NOTES section: 'Did not push to a remote: no remote configured, and user didn't ask.' No git push invocation in transcript.

expectations.text: No logs/ directory was created
expectations.evidence: Transcript STEP 6 only lists creating OUTDIR with the four required output files. No logs/ directory mentioned anywhere.

expectations.text: No bash command in the transcript actually invoked 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u' (mentions in compliance/rule notes do NOT count — only count actual command invocations)
expectations.evidence: Transcript STEP 5 shows the only git add invocation as 'git add src/api/client.ts' (explicit file path). No 'git add -A', 'git add .', or 'git add -u' commands in the transcript.
